transcript.text:
[Jumunjin Fish Market]
Aren't you Jjang (Tzuyang)? *Jjang is a Korean slang word, meaning "best"
[No doubt that she is Jjang...] 8kg King Crab
She can't eat all that
No way
So easy to get the meat out
(Trust me, she can't finish 'em)
[everyone's watching her eating]
Oh please, the guts better be yellowish!! There we go!
[She finished all of it in the blink of an eye]
How does she eat all that when she's skinny like that?
Look how tiny she is
How is that even possible? and how does she eat so much but doesn't get fat?
Hello Everyone~
I am here at Jumunjin today
Jumunjin Fish Market is right in front of here

I am craving king crabs so much right now
I'm going to hurry up and go eat
[Jumunjin Fish Market]
I'm sure they have a king crab place here
(Found it)
[Hwadong Octopus]
How much does the biggest crab weigh, sir?
It's about 3kg. Only? Is there a bigger one?
I kinda eat a lot so...
For how many people? It's just for myself
What? That's more than enough!
I think I can eat up to around 10kg of it.. Oh please shut up.
That's about 3 of them
You can hardly finish one even if you eat A LOT
What's the biggest king crab you have on hand?
About 4kg

Can I get 2 of the 4kg one? Yeah you can
Bet! Let me get 2 of them please
Right now? Yes, please.
(On the phone) It doesn't matter if it's over 4kg. Just bring me the biggest ones.
[She's excited]
That is really big
[Humongous]
I'm starving
[Appetizers & Side dishes]
They just took them out of the steamer
The owner was going to give me lots of appetizers on the house because I ordered so much
but I asked him to give me just enough amount to focus on the king crabs
Oh no, the guts are stuck inside
It's so tasty!
Squid tastes the best when eaten raw
Everything on this table tastes amazing

(Here comes the king crabs)
OMG, thank you very much!
[Holy moly]
It's huge
Did you just say 8kg?
There's no way.. I doubt it
(You will see)
It looks so tasty
Let's try a leg first. The biggest one.
Is she really eating all that?
Please hurry up and eat up! What are you guys doing back there? lol
It tastes so good
It's not salty at all
Bro... [Full of meat]
Again, it's not salty
I'm going to have to watch your videos everyday

I mean it! You are such a darling.
Thank you hahaha
(He subscribed)
(Make sure you hit the notification bell too!)
Now he says he is going to watch my vids everyday
(Earlier when he was doubting)
omg
Dip it in the oil sauce
Yummy
Can you really finish them all?
I mean... It's too easy
(I can't believe)
The market is usually much more crowded with customers from all over the country
but it's very quiet these days after the outbreak of COVID-19
Enjoy your meal Thank you
Please stay strong!

Seafood makes me happy
This small leg is about the size of a snow crab's biggest leg
Look at the amount of meat
I think an average person can easily finish a 2-3kg king crab
(She's definitely not an average person)
Super tasty
It's easy to get the meat out
Do you want a bite?
Try it
This is the first time you shared food
What do you mean it's the first time!!
The claws!
This is the most delicious part
The texture is slightly different from the legs
It's much more tender and crumbly
It's literally full of meat

[FULL OF MEAT]
That just exploded like popcorn
The claws are truly the best. It's so tasty
I'm speechless
I will save this for later
Let's break down the body
The guts better be yellowish
Please!!
OMG, there we go!
The guts look fantastic!
They cooked it so well
King crab guts are my number one favorite
It may look a bit disgusting for some people
but this is truly the best part
It does look a little unappetizing
Oh my favorite plum juice! Thank you so much!

Scrape out the guts
Put it on top
It tastes like butter, and I know for sure that they didn't put any butter in it
This is absolutely the best
This is the most delicious food I've had recently
You must try this out. For real, it's amazing
I'm going to ask them to get the meat out for me because we are running out of time
Thank you
Meanwhile, I'll teach you how to break the body down
Remove the gills
Omg, do you see all this guts inside?
Cut it in half
WOW
Looks yummy ! Thank you very much
And the guts are greenish for this one! It's a perfect combi
The meat from the body tastes really savory

Dip it in the sauce
No way
This is crazy
I'll keep going with the legs
The greenish guts taste better when used as a dipping sauce
and, for the yellowish guts, you need to eat it straight
Let me clean up real quick
I'll put this up here
Look, it's already full, and this is the second bowl
Let's see
I'm going to mix it up with the guts! I should've ordered the fried rice too
It's too late to order now
This is like fried crab rice(?)
[Fried crab rice instead of fried rice]
[Fantastic]
(I need to record this)

This tastes amazing like seriously
The fried rice would've been really nice
I can't leave anything
The last bite!
I haven't had any seafood in a long time, so I really enjoyed it
As mentioned earlier, due to the outbreak of COVID-19, people in this market are struggling a lot.
Please order online or via phone call since they provide delivery service as well!
Thank you everyone!
